text: Stepping through the glass doors into this vibrant, curated space, I am caught between anticipation and curiosity. The bold colors and the promise of 'R+D' awaken my sense of wonder at human innovation. I feel a bit like an explorer, eager to understand how spaces mediate our relationship with knowledge and invention. The hum of technology around me amplifies the strangeness of being both observer and participant. I am alert, a little exhilarated, and keen to see what new ideas might challenge my thinking here.
